chat.title: Follow-Up Chat

step1.title: Choose a verse or topic
step1.desc: Enter any Bible reference like "John 3:16" or ask a spiritual question like "What does the Bible say about anxiety?" — Disciplefy understands both and gets you started instantly.
step1.imageAlt: Disciplefy app — Bible verse search screen, type John 3:16 or a spiritual question to begin

step2.title: Get an instant AI guide
step2.desc: Our AI generates a complete study guide in seconds — a clear summary, historical and cultural context, verse-by-verse interpretation, practical life application, and related scripture references, all grounded in sound theology.
step2.imageAlt: AI-generated Bible study guide showing historical context, verse-by-verse interpretation and life application

step3.title: Talk to your AI Voice Discipler
step3.desc: Have a real voice conversation about any Bible passage or spiritual question. Your AI Voice Discipler listens, responds naturally in your language, and walks you through Scripture like a personal Bible study companion — anytime, anywhere.
step3.imageAlt: Voice Discipler conversation screen — speak your Bible question and hear a response in your language

step4.title: Follow a learning path
step4.desc: Go deeper with structured discipleship journeys on Grace, Prayer, Faith, and more. Each path walks you through a curated sequence of lessons — so you're not just studying random verses, you're growing with purpose and direction.
step4.imageAlt: Discipleship learning path screen showing structured journeys on Grace, Prayer and Faith

step5.title: Memorize & grow
step5.desc: Build lasting habits with daily verse reminders, spaced-repetition memorization practice with audio and fill-in-the-blank modes, streak tracking to stay consistent, and a growing library of your saved study guides.
step5.imageAlt: Daily verse reminder and memorization practice screen with streak tracking and saved study guides

languageShowcase.title: Study in Your Heart Language
languageShowcase.subtitle: Native-quality AI in all three languages — not a translation, a truly multilingual experience.
